privileged_info_summary: The task uses the official DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database (real, not synthetic) from https://databases.dhis2.org/, available in versions 2.40.0 through 2.40.11. The metadata contains discrepancies with the task description: (1) Group names in metadata are 'Global Fund' and 'USAID', but the description specifies 'Donor: Global Fund' and 'Donor: USAID' with a prefix; (2) visualization_name metadata is 'Donor Funding Analysis' but the description requires 'Donor Funding Analysis 2024'. The verifier uses case-insensitive substring matching for group and group set names, making the prefix optional for matching. Critically, the verifier does NOT check the visualization name—it only verifies the group set ID is used in the visualization, making the visualization_name metadata claim irrelevant to task completion.
